name: gitlab-mcp
description: Inspect GitLab merge requests, issues, pipelines, and wiki content, then write review feedback and draft notes through the @zereight/mcp-gitlab server.

interface.shortDescription: Review merge requests, draft feedback, and inspect pipelines through GitLab MCP
interface.longDescription: Use GitLab MCP to inspect merge requests, diffs, discussions, issues, wiki pages, and pipelines in GitLab, then draft or publish review feedback through the @zereight/mcp-gitlab server without relying on ChatGPT app login.
defaultPrompt: Inspect this GitLab merge request, summarize the risk, and draft review notes before publishing them
Check the latest GitLab pipeline and explain why the failed jobs broke
Look up a GitLab issue or wiki page and tell me what needs attention
